bids.reasoning: I am targeting maximum utility at the opening since time pressure is absent at t=0.00. The opponent’s only offer gives me the lowest valid value on every issue, so there is no evidence of concession yet and I should counter with my strongest bid.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.92 because it is still very early at t=0.02, so there is little need to concede on high-importance issues. The opponent has moved from all valueD to only conceding issueA to valueC, which improves my utility slightly but still remains low for me, so I will make a small concession on my least important issueD while holding issueA, issueB, and issueC at my best values.

I am targeting a high early-round utility around 0.87, since time is still only t=0.04 and there is no need to concede heavily yet. The opponent’s valid offers remain very low for me and mostly use valueD, with only small/unstable movement, so I will concede on lower-weight issueD and moderately on issueC while holding firm on the more important issueA and issueB.

At t=0.06 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high utility while making a modest concession on lower-weight issues; this bid gives me about 0.814 utility. The opponent’s valid offers have improved somewhat for me overall, especially on issueA and issueC, but they are still holding issueB and issueD at valueD, so I will hold firm on my two highest-weight issues while conceding further on issueC and issueD.

I am targeting a high utility bid of about 0.866 because it is still very early at t=0.08, so there is no need to make large concessions yet. The opponent has improved from all valueD to some concessions on issueA and issueC, but they are still holding issueB and issueD at valueD, so I will hold firm on my most important issues A and B while conceding on lower-weight issueD and partially on issueC.
